description:
Spotify to Teams Status Sync

Automatically syncs your currently playing Spotify track to your Microsoft Teams status message. Set a custom status message using placeholders like {artist}, {track}, {album}, and {emoji}.
What's Changed
- docs(architecture): rewrite to reflect v2.7.0–v2.8.0 codebase reality by @Carme99 in #132
- fix(security): drop redundant remove_file in atomic_write_json + honest SECURITY.md rewording by @Carme99 in #133
- docs(state-of-features): new doc answering 'does this work in my setup?' by @Carme99 in #134
- docs(security): correct two historical-tense claims about tokens.json storage by @Carme99 in #136
- deps(frontend)(deps-dev): bump @sveltejs/kit from 2.68.0 to 2.69.1 in the npm-minor-and-patch group by @dependabot[bot] in #137
- deps(backend)(deps): bump tauri from 2.11.3 to 2.11.5 in /src-tauri in the cargo-minor-and-patch group by @dependabot[bot] in #138
- fix(security): tighten tokens.json + config.json to mode 0600 (issue #135 path A) by @Carme99 in #139
- feat(ui): visual refresh — design system, light/dark themes, new brand mark by @Carme99 in #141
Full Changelog: v2.8.0...v2.9.0
